events.event_description: Embassy established in East Germany; first Ambassador John Sherman Cooper presented credentials.

evidence.quote: John Sherman Cooper, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1974-09-19. Credentials presented: 1974-12-20. Left post on 1976-09-28.

events.event_description: Embassy Berlin closed at midnight, coinciding with German reunification and the dissolution of East Germany.

evidence.quote: Richard Clark Barkley, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1988-10-17. Credentials presented: 1988-12-19. Embassy Berlin was closed at midnight 1990-10-02.
